title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 019
task1_desc: Write a script to display months from the year 1900 to 2019 where you find 5 weekends i.e. 5 Friday, 5 Saturday and 5 Sunday.
task1_body: Write a script to display months from the year 1900 to 2019 where you find 5 weekends i.e. 5 Friday, 5 Saturday and 5 Sunday.
task2_desc: Write a script that can wrap the given paragraph at a specified column using the [greedy algorithm](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Line_wrap_and_word_wrap#Minimum_number_of_lines).
task2_body: Write a script that can wrap the given paragraph at a specified column using the [greedy algorithm](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Line_wrap_and_word_wrap#Minimum_number_of_lines).
